problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Glial. Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
